prompt: The program crashes when run with no arguments. What is the bug?
choices: args is always null when no arguments are provided
args[0] throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when no arguments are provided
String cannot be assigned from an array element
main() requires at least one argument to run
explanation: When no arguments are provided, args is an empty array. args[0] throws ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException. Fix: check if (args.length > 0) first, or use a try-catch, or provide a usage message.
